import { useState } from 'react'; import image4 from '../assets/image4.jpg'; import styles from '../styles/ContactPage.module.css'; function ContactPage() { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', email: '', message: '' }); const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); console.log('Form submitted:', formData); setSubmitted(true); }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

🎮 Gaming Training Centers

Find the nearest gaming hub to level up your skills

{/* Contact Form Section - FIRST */}

📧 Send Us a Message

Have questions about our training programs? Reach out to us!

{submitted ? (
✅

Thank you {formData.name}!

We will get back to you within 24 hours.

) : (
